pages.title: Warp Blade
pages.text: A glass-edged short sword. Hitting a living target has a chance to teleport them a short random distance. The disorientation usually hurts more than the blade does.

pages.title: Stygian Dagger
pages.text: An Ender-kin weapon. Strikes against the $(l:bloodmagic:demon_will)wilful$() — demons, the Ender and their ilk — land with noticeably greater force.
